testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
18:21:13.148 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.solarisbank.analytics_service.AnalyticsServiceApplicationTests]: AnalyticsServiceApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 18:21:13.205 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.solarisbank.analytics_service.AnalyticsServiceApplication for test class com.solarisbank.analytics_service.AnalyticsServiceApplicationTests 18:21:13.260 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.solarisbank.analytics_service.AnalyticsServiceApplicationTests]: AnalyticsServiceApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 18:21:13.261 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.solarisbank.analytics_service.AnalyticsServiceApplication for test class com.solarisbank.analytics_service.AnalyticsServiceApplicationTests 18:21:13.304 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

: Error executing DDL "create table spending_aggregates (month smallint not null, total_credit numeric(38,2) not null, total_debit numeric(38,2) not null, tx_count integer not null, year smallint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, account_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, category varchar(255) not null, primary key (id))" via JDBC [Erreur de syntaxe dans l'instruction SQL "create table spending_aggregates ([*]month smallint not null, total_credit numeric(38,2) not null, total_debit numeric(38,2) not null, tx_count integer not null, year smallint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, account_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, category varchar(255) not null, primary key (id))"; attendu "identifier" Syntax error in SQL statement "create table spending_aggregates ([*]month smallint not null, total_credit numeric(38,2) not null, total_debit numeric(38,2) not null, tx_count integer not null, year smallint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, account_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, category varchar(255) not null, primary key (id))"; expected "identifier";]
